patches_added.name: Network proxy
patches_added.description: Adds settings to route supported network requests through an HTTP or HTTPS proxy.

patches_added.name: Scrobbling
patches_added.description: Adds options to add played tracks to Last.fm and ListenBrainz.

patches_added.name: SponsorBlock
patches_added.description: Adds options to enable and configure SponsorBlock, which can skip non-music segments.

patches_modified.name: Bypass certificate checks
patches_modified.description: Bypasses certificate checks which prevent YouTube Music from working on Android Auto.

patches_modified.name: Change header
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to change the header logo in the top left corner of the app.

patches_modified.name: Change miniplayer color
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to change the miniplayer background color to match the fullscreen player.

patches_modified.name: Change start page
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to set which page the app opens in instead of the homepage.

patches_modified.name: Check watch history domain name resolution
patches_modified.description: Checks if the device DNS server is preventing user watch history from being saved.

patches_modified.name: Custom branding
patches_modified.description: Adds options to change the app icon and app name. Branding cannot be changed for mounted (root) installations.

patches_modified.name: Disable DRC audio
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to disable DRC (Dynamic Range Compression) audio.

patches_modified.name: Disable QUIC protocol
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to disable QUIC (Quick UDP Internet Connections) network protocol.

patches_modified.name: Enable debugging
patches_modified.description: Adds options for debugging and exporting Morphe logs to the clipboard.

patches_modified.name: Enable exclusive audio playback
patches_modified.description: Enables the option to play audio without video.

patches_modified.name: Enable forced miniplayer
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to enable forced miniplayer when switching between music videos, podcasts, or songs.

patches_modified.name: Enable swipe to dismiss miniplayer
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to enable dismissing the miniplayer by swiping down on it.

patches_modified.name: Force original audio
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to always use the original audio track.

patches_modified.name: GmsCore support
patches_modified.description: Allows the app to work without root by using a different package name when patched using a GmsCore instead of Google Play Services.

patches_modified.name: Hide ads
patches_modified.description: Adds options to hide ads such as the fullscreen Premium popup and "Get Music Premium" label.

patches_modified.name: Hide buttons
patches_modified.description: Adds options to hide the cast, history, notification, and search buttons.

patches_modified.name: Hide category bar
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to hide the category bar at the top of the homepage.

patches_modified.name: Hide music video ads
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to hide ads that appear while listening to or streaming music videos, podcasts, or songs.

patches_modified.name: Miniplayer previous and next buttons
patches_modified.description: Adds options to show previous and next track buttons in the miniplayer.

patches_modified.name: Navigation bar
patches_modified.description: Adds options to hide navigation bar, labels and buttons.

patches_modified.name: Permanent repeat
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to always repeat even if the playlist ends or another track is played.

patches_modified.name: Remove background playback restrictions
patches_modified.description: Removes restrictions on background playback, including playing kids videos in the background.

patches_modified.name: Sanitize sharing links
patches_modified.description: Removes the tracking query parameters from shared links.

patches_modified.name: Spoof video streams
patches_modified.description: Adds options to spoof the client video streams to fix playback.

patches_modified.name: Theme
patches_modified.description: Adds options for theming and applies a custom background theme (dark background theme defaults to pure black).

patches_modified.name: Track crossfade
patches_modified.description: Adds a true dual-player crossfade between consecutive tracks. Requires YouTube Music 9.00 or newer; on older versions the patch is a no-op.

patches_added.name: Add to queue
patches_added.description: Overrides the feed flyout 'Play next in queue' with the Morphe video queue.

patches_added.name: Network proxy
patches_added.description: Adds settings to route supported network requests through an HTTP or HTTPS proxy.

patches_added.name: Voice over translation
patches_added.description: Adds additional voice over languages using text-to-speech synchronized to the video playback.

patches_modified.name: Alternative thumbnails
patches_modified.description: Adds options to replace video thumbnails using the DeArrow API or image captures from the video.

patches_modified.name: Ambient mode
patches_modified.description: Adds options to bypass power saving restrictions for Ambient mode and disable it entirely or in fullscreen.

patches_modified.name: Bypass image region restrictions
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to use a different host for user avatar and channel images and can fix missing images that are blocked in some countries.

patches_modified.name: Bypass link redirects
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to bypass redirects and open the original link directly.

patches_modified.name: Captions
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to disable captions from being automatically enabled or to set caption cookies.

patches_modified.name: Change form factor
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to change the UI appearance to a phone, tablet, or automotive device.

patches_modified.name: Change header
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to change the header logo in the top left corner of the app.

patches_modified.name: Change start page
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to set which page the app opens in instead of the homepage.

patches_modified.name: Check watch history domain name resolution
patches_modified.description: Checks if the device DNS server is preventing user watch history from being saved.

patches_modified.name: Copy video link
patches_modified.description: Adds options to display buttons in the video player to copy video links.

patches_modified.name: Custom branding
patches_modified.description: Adds options to change the app icon and app name. Branding cannot be changed for mounted (root) installations.

patches_modified.name: Custom player overlay opacity
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to change the opacity of the video player background when player controls are visible.

patches_modified.name: Disable DRC audio
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to disable DRC (Dynamic Range Compression) audio.

patches_modified.name: Disable QUIC protocol
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to disable QUIC (Quick UDP Internet Connections) network protocol.

patches_modified.name: Disable Shorts resuming on startup
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to disable Shorts from resuming on app startup when Shorts were last being watched.

patches_modified.name: Disable double tap actions
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to disable player double tap gestures.

patches_modified.name: Disable fullscreen gestures
patches_modified.description: Adds options to selectively disable gestures for entering and exiting fullscreen mode.

patches_modified.name: Disable haptic feedback
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to disable haptic feedback in the player for various actions.

patches_modified.name: Disable layout updates
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to disable server side layout updates and use an older UI.

patches_modified.name: Disable player popup panels
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to disable panels (such as live chat) from opening automatically.

patches_modified.name: Disable rolling number animations
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to disable rolling number animations of video view count, user likes, and upload time.

patches_modified.name: Disable sign in to TV popup
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to disable the popup asking to sign into a TV on the same local network.

patches_modified.name: Disable video codecs
patches_modified.description: Adds options to disable HDR and VP9 codecs.

patches_modified.name: Double tap to seek
patches_modified.description: Adds additional double-tap to seek values to the YouTube settings menu.

patches_modified.name: Downloads
patches_modified.description: Adds support to download videos with an external downloader app using the in-app download button or a video player action button.

patches_modified.name: Enable debugging
patches_modified.description: Adds options for debugging and exporting Morphe logs to the clipboard.

patches_modified.name: Exit fullscreen mode
patches_modified.description: Adds options to automatically exit fullscreen mode when a video reaches the end.

patches_modified.name: Force original audio
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to always use the original audio track.

patches_modified.name: GmsCore support
patches_modified.description: Allows the app to work without root by using a different package name when patched using a GmsCore instead of Google Play Services.

patches_modified.name: Hide Shorts components
patches_modified.description: Adds options to hide components related to Shorts.

patches_modified.name: Hide ads
patches_modified.description: Adds options to remove general ads.

patches_modified.name: Hide autoplay preview
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to hide the autoplay preview at the end of videos.

patches_modified.name: Hide end screen cards
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to hide suggested video cards at the end of videos.

patches_modified.name: Hide end screen suggested video
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to hide the suggested video at the end of videos.

patches_modified.name: Hide info cards
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to hide info cards that creators add in the video player.

patches_modified.name: Hide layout components
patches_modified.description: Adds options to hide general layout components.

patches_modified.name: Hide player flyout menu components
patches_modified.description: Adds options to hide menu components that appear when pressing the gear icon in the video player.

patches_modified.name: Hide player overlay buttons
patches_modified.description: Adds options to hide the player Cast, Autoplay, Captions, Previous & Next buttons, and the player control buttons background.

patches_modified.name: Hide related video overlay
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to hide the related video overlay shown when swiping up in fullscreen.

patches_modified.name: Hide related videos
patches_modified.description: Adds options to hide related videos.

patches_modified.name: Hide timestamp
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to hide the timestamp in the bottom left of the video player.

patches_modified.name: Hide video action buttons
patches_modified.description: Adds options to hide video action buttons in fullscreen and portrait modes.

patches_modified.name: Loop video
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to loop videos and display loop video button in the video player.

patches_modified.name: Media notification controls
patches_modified.description: Adds options to disable the seekbar and previous/next buttons in the media notification and headphone controls.

patches_modified.name: Miniplayer
patches_modified.description: Adds options to change the in-app minimized player.

patches_modified.name: Navigation bar
patches_modified.description: Adds options to hide and change the bottom navigation bar (such as the Shorts button)  and the upper navigation toolbar. Patching version 20.21.37 and lower also adds a setting to use a wide searchbar.

patches_modified.name: Open Shorts in regular player
patches_modified.description: Adds options to open Shorts in the regular video player.

patches_modified.name: Open channel of live avatar
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to prevent a channel's current live video from opening when tapping its avatar.

patches_modified.name: Open links externally
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to always open links in your browser instead of with the in-app browser.

patches_modified.name: Open system share sheet
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to always open the system share sheet instead of the in-app share sheet.

patches_modified.name: Open videos fullscreen
patches_modified.description: Adds options to automatically open videos in fullscreen portrait or landscape mode.

patches_modified.name: Override YouTube Music buttons
patches_modified.description: Overrides YouTube Music buttons to open Morphe Music or any compatible third-party client.

patches_modified.name: Play all
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to play all the videos from a channel and to display play all button in the video player.

patches_modified.name: Playback speed
patches_modified.description: Adds options to customize available playback speeds, set a default playback speed, and show a speed dialog button in the video player.

patches_modified.name: Reload video
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to display reload video button in the video player.

patches_modified.name: Remove background playback restrictions
patches_modified.description: Removes restrictions on background playback, including playing kids videos in the background.

patches_modified.name: Remove viewer discretion dialog
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to remove the dialog that appears when opening a video that has been age-restricted by accepting it automatically. This does not bypass the age restriction.

patches_modified.name: Return YouTube Dislike
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to show the dislike count of videos with Return YouTube Dislike.

patches_modified.name: Sanitize sharing links
patches_modified.description: Removes the tracking query parameters from shared links.

patches_modified.name: Save to watch later
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to display save to watch later button in the video player.

patches_modified.name: Seekbar
patches_modified.description: Adds options to disable precise seeking when swiping up on the seekbar, slide to seek instead of playing at 2x speed when pressing and holding, tapping the player seekbar to seek, hiding the video player seekbar, enabling seeking in livestreams, and expanding the livestream DVR duration.

patches_modified.name: Shorts autoplay
patches_modified.description: Adds options to automatically play the next Short.

patches_modified.name: SponsorBlock
patches_modified.description: Adds options to enable and configure SponsorBlock, which can skip undesired video segments such as sponsored content.

patches_modified.name: Spoof app version
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to trick YouTube into thinking you are running an older version of the app. This can be used to restore old UI elements and features.

patches_modified.name: Spoof device dimensions
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to spoof the device dimensions which can unlock higher video qualities.

patches_modified.name: Spoof video streams
patches_modified.description: Adds options to spoof the client video streams to fix playback.

patches_modified.name: Swipe controls
patches_modified.description: Adds options to enable and configure volume and brightness swipe controls.

patches_modified.name: Theme
patches_modified.description: Adds options for theming and applies a custom background theme (dark background theme defaults to pure black).

patches_modified.name: Video ads
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to remove ads in the video player.

patches_modified.name: Video quality
patches_modified.description: Adds options to set default video qualities and always use the advanced video quality menu.

patches_added.name: Hide Trending shelves
patches_added.description: Adds an option to hide the Trending shelves from feed and search suggestions.

patches_added.name: Hide communities shelf
patches_added.description: Adds an option to hide the related or suggested communities shelf in subreddits.

patches_removed.name: Hide Trending Today shelf
patches_removed.description: Adds an option to hide the Trending Today shelf from search suggestions.

patches_removed.name: Hide recommended communities shelf
patches_removed.description: Adds an option to hide the recommended communities shelves in subreddits.

patches_modified.name: Custom branding name for Reddit
patches_modified.description: Changes the Reddit app name to the name specified in patch options.

patches_modified.name: Disable modern home
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to disable the modern home UI. This patch works with Reddit 2026.24.0 and earlier.

patches_modified.name: Disable screenshot popup
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to disable the popup that appears when taking a screenshot.

patches_modified.name: Hide Ask button
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to hide Ask button in the search bar.

patches_modified.name: Hide Reddit search
patches_modified.description: Permanently hides the Reddit search in the contextual menu. This patch does not work with root mounting

patches_modified.name: Hide ads
patches_modified.description: Adds options to hide ads.

patches_modified.name: Hide navigation buttons
patches_modified.description: Adds options to hide buttons in the navigation bar.

patches_modified.name: Hide sidebar components
patches_modified.description: Adds options to hide the sidebar components.

patches_modified.name: Open links directly
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to skip over redirection URLs in external links.

patches_modified.name: Open links externally
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to always open links in your browser instead of with the in-app-browser.

patches_modified.name: Remove subreddit dialog
patches_modified.description: Adds options to remove the NSFW community warning and notifications suggestion dialogs by dismissing them automatically.

patches_modified.name: Sanitize sharing links
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to sanitize sharing links by removing tracking query parameters.

patches_modified.name: Show view count
patches_modified.description: Adds an option to show the view count of Posts.

patches_modified.name: Spoof signature
patches_modified.description: Spoofs the signature of the app to fix notification issues.

patches_modified.name: Bypass member rights check
patches_modified.description: Forces MemberCheckResult.isPassed() to always return Boolean.TRUE, bypassing the server-side membership gate and preventing the 'Get Premium / 7-day trial' dialog.

patches_modified.name: Clear VIP resolution tip
patches_modified.description: Forces MemberResolutionBean.getVipResolutionTip() to always return Boolean.FALSE, suppressing any 'VIP only' badge shown on resolution options.

patches_modified.name: Spoof member active status
patches_modified.description: Forces MemberInfo.isActive() to always return true, making the app believe the membership subscription is active.

patches_modified.name: Spoof member days left
patches_modified.description: Forces MemberInfo.getDaysLeft() to always return 3650 (10 years), preventing the '0 days left' display on the premium screen.

patches_modified.name: Spoof member provider flags
patches_modified.description: Forces MemberProvider.c() (kv_is_pay_enable_member) and MemberProvider.e() (kv_is_skip_ad) to always return true.

patches_modified.name: Suppress newbie bonus dialog
patches_modified.description: Makes MemberProvider.w(F)V return immediately, suppressing the 'Claim 7-day trial / newbies bonus' ClaimMemberDialog popup.

patches_modified.name: Unlock member resolution
patches_modified.description: Forces MemberResolutionBean.isUnlock() to always return Boolean.TRUE, making all locally-cached episodes appear as unlocked to the playback layer.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Premium
patches_modified.description: Unlocks premium features in app.

patches_modified.name: Remove ads
patches_modified.description: Stubs all ad loading paths: banner/interstitial loaders, billing callbacks, and ad SDK init.

patches_added.name: Unlock Pro
patches_added.description: Unlocks all premium features in Case Tracker — Immigration.

patches_removed.name: Remove Ads
patches_removed.description: Removes interstitial, app-open and native ads.

patches_removed.name: Unlock Premium
patches_removed.description: Unlocks Premium Features In the App.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Premium
patches_modified.description: Unlocks Windy Pro features.
